summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.model; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import eu.kalafatic.utils.convert.ConvertUtils; public class ComboData { public List<Element> data = new ArrayList<Element>(); public int defaultSelection = 0; public ComboData(int defaultSelection, String... items) { this.defaultSelection = defaultSelection; for (int i = 0; i < items.length; i++) { data.add(new Element(i, items[i])); } }
